name: project
displayName: Institutional project constituting the framework of the research which resulted in the creation of the dataset

name: project shortName
displayName: Short name of the project, used by the teams

name: projectID
displayName: Official identifier of the project (please check on GDoc for institutional project identifier)

name: projectPurpose
displayName: Textual description of the goals and purpose of the project

name: projectStudyArea
displayName: Textual description of the study area

name: projectFunding
displayName: Source of funding for the project, please include the institution, and potential identifiers of the funding.

name: contractor
displayName: In case of independent contracting this group of variable allows us to link contractors and their institutional contracts

name: accessLicence
displayName: Description of the conditions for access

name: altered
displayName: Whether the accessible data has been altered or anonymised in order to protect people or species

name: restrictedUntil
displayName: Date at which an embargoed dataset will be freed
